en: Ooh, what's that? Oh, that's me.
Wow. You certainly think a lot of yourself.
Oh, I see. I thought you just really, really liked your new couch.
ko: 아, 알겠어. 네가 새 소파를 정말 좋아한다고 생각했어.

en: You know, just... just follow my lead. Okay.
Come on, Chandler. Oh. All right, okay.
Here we go. All right. Ready?
Turn. I don't think we can turn anymore.
ko: 더 이상 돌릴 수 없을 것 같아.

en: I just don't think it's gonna fit. Oh, yeah, it will. Come on, up, up, up, up.
